## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build:force` (for build/runtime changes)
- [ ] Manual QA notes added below when UI/runtime behavior changed

## Risk areas

- [ ] IPC/shared types
- [ ] Filesystem or git mutation
- [ ] Terminal/session behavior
- [ ] Webview/browser bridge
- [ ] Extension loading/bridge
- [ ] Packaging/release
